session.user:
Change to the repository root at /home/runner/work/erk/erk and execute: make fast-ci
Report the full output including pass/fail status for each check.
session.assistant: I'll execute the `make fast-ci` command in the repository root and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Execute fast-ci target to run development checks

session.assistant:
## Fast CI Results: PASSED
All checks passed successfully. Here's the summary:
**Lint:** All checks passed
**Format Check:** 1605 files already formatted
**Prettier Check:** All matched files use Prettier code style
**Markdown Check:** Passed
**Exec Reference Check:** .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date
**Type Checking (ty):** All checks passed
**Unit Tests (erk):** 5609 passed in 12.46s
**Tests (erk-dev):** 136 passed in 4.32s
**Tests (erk-statusline):** 115 passed in 0.80s
**Tests (erk-mcp):** 27 passed
**AGENTS.md standard:** PASSED - All CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired (19 files checked, 0 violations)
**Total Status:** All CI checks passed with a combined test count of 5,897 passing tests across all test suites.
